channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Hawk Tuah girl remains radio silent after her crypto controversy
item.description: Has anyone checked in on Hawk Tuah girl? “When are we getting a new Talk Tuah episode? We’re starving for more Talk Tuah,” one X user posted yesterday. “Where is hawk tuah girl. Is she safe. Is she alright,” wrote another.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft makes OpenAI’s o1 model free for Copilot users
item.description: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman writes on LinkedIn that the company is now making OpenAI’s reasoning model o1 free to use for all users of Microsoft’s AI assistant Copilot. Microsoft calls the functionality itself “Think Deeper.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Hoping for new desktop CPUs from Intel this year? I hate to break it to you, but it still very much sounds like they won’t arrive until 2026 with Nova Lake
item.description: One of Intel’s interim co-CEOs has dropped some clues about what kind of CPUs we’re getting in the near future.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: US Justice Department sues to block billion-dollar HPE-Juniper deal
item.description: US Department of Justice has challenged HPE-Juniper deal effects on competition, despite EU and UK approval.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: La seguridad cuántica acerca a IBM y Telefónica Tech con un nuevo acuerdo de colaboración
item.description: La computación cuántica es una disciplina por la que muchas organizaciones están apostando firmemente, especialmente en el desarrollo y las garantías de una tecnología criptográficamente segura, dados los desafíos futuros a los que podrían enfrentarse.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Maximise device lifecycles
item.description: In today’s business environment, where IT budgets are tight and sustainability is paramount, striking a balance between financial and environmental objectives is crucial.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: DNA Technology Helps Solve 45-Year-Old Cold Case in Hawaii - Former McKinley High School Student Arrested
item.description: Hawaii authorities have arrested a 66-year-old man, Gideon Castro, in connection with the 1977 murder of Dawn Momohara, a 16-year-old student at Honolulu's McKinley High School. DNA technology played a crucial role in solving the cold case.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Sinco Kelleher, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: RFK Jr. kept asking to see the science that vaccines were safe. After he saw it, he dismissed it
item.description: The man who hopes to be President Donald Trump’s health secretary says he needs to see data showing vaccines are safe, but he dismissed the evidence shown by an influential Republican senator.
item.dc:creator: Lauran Neergaard And Mike Stobbe, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: US cybersecurity agency's future role in elections remains murky under the Trump administration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation’s cybersecurity agency has played a critical role in helping states shore up the defenses of their voting systems, but its election mission appears uncertain amid sustained criticism from Republicans and key figures in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Coming soon
item.description: The Deepseek-R1 model has managed to attract a lot of attention in a short time, especially because it can be used commercially without restrictions.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Timeline of HPE’s $14 billion bid for Juniper
item.description: AI is a key factor in one of the tech industry’s most significant M&A developments: HPE’s proposed acquisition of Juniper Networks. The $14 billion deal would shake up the industry, and regulatory watchdogs in the U.S. and worldwide have raised antitrust concerns.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Amazon sues state agency to block release of company records to Bezos-owned Washington Post
item.description: Amazon is suing a Washington state agency to prevent the release of some company materials to The Washington Post, the newspaper which is owned by Amazon founder Jeff Bezos.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Annoyed Samsung fans have started a petition to bring Bluetooth back to the S Pen – and they have a point
item.description: Several thousand Samsung fans have signed a petition calling for the reintroduction of Bluetooth to the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra’s S Pen, after connectivity was removed with the new S25 Ultra.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Max rolls out a new multiview feature for 2025's NASCAR Cup Series that puts you in the driver's seat
item.description: Max is set to offer its first multiview experience with 'NASCAR Driver Cam' starting on February 2, 2025 – here's everything you need to know.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: OpenAI to partner with US National Laboratories to boost national security
item.description: OpenAI announced Thursday it is partnering with the Los Alamos National Laboratory to install its newest artificial intelligence models onto the lab's supercomputer for national security research. "We care a lot about AI and science, we've talked about this for a very long time.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: The oldest evidence for lead pollution comes from ancient Greece
item.description: Researchers have found the oldest known evidence of lead pollution dating to around 5,200 years ago in ancient Greece.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Microsoft’s new DocumentDB rethinks NoSQL on PostgreSQL
item.description: Microsoft’s recent launch of a standalone version of the MongoDB compatibility layer for its global-scale Azure Cosmos DB brought back an old name. Back in 2018, when the company unveiled a public version of the Project Florence database engine that powers much of Azure, they called it DocumentDB.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How execs can bridge the AI knowledge gap
item.description: From streamlining administrative tasks to enhancing brainstorming sessions, AI is becoming an essential workplace companion. Yet, despite its transformative promise, its integration isn’t as simple as flipping a switch.
item.dc:creator: Dave Grow, Fast Company

item.title: Alibaba rolls out AI model, claiming it’s better than DeepSeek-V3
item.description: Chinese tech company Alibaba on Wednesday released a new version of its Qwen 2.5 artificial intelligence model that it claimed surpassed the highly-acclaimed DeepSeek-V3.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft reports 10% quarterly profit growth as it works to show AI investments paying off
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Most in new poll disapprove of Musk's role in Trump administration
item.description: Most registered voters disapprove of tech billionaire Elon Musk’s role in the Trump administration, according to a poll released Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 200 UK companies adopt a permanent four-day work week
item.description: Two years after participating in a groundbreaking four-day work week experiment, 200 companies in the UK have chosen to adopt the policy permanently, marking a significant shift in workplace norms.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Industry coalition presses DOGE to act on digital identity
item.description: Digital identity advocates are calling on Trump administration to boost the use of mobile drivers licenses and other digital identity verification use cases. The post Industry coalition presses DOGE to act on digital identity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Windows 11: A guide to the updates
item.description: A Windows launch isn’t the end a process — it’s really just the beginning. Microsoft continually works on improving Windows 11 by fixing bugs, releasing security patches, and occasionally adding new features.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: DeepSeek's new AI chatbot and ChatGPT answer sensitive questions about China differently
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI's ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: New federal CIO onboard at OMB
item.description: Greg Barbaccia takes over for Clare Martorana as the government’s lead technology executive. The post New federal CIO onboard at OMB first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: People are hawking TikTok-loaded phones for thousands on eBay, Facebook
item.description: People are listing phones preloaded with TikTok for tens of thousands of dollars on eBay, Facebook marketplace and other online storefronts — though it is not clear if there are many buyers at those prices. TikTok was briefly unavailable to U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
